Appointment - Class in myatt.model
 
Appointment(int, String) - Constructor for class myatt.model.Appointment
Constructor for the reports where only the total and type are needed.
Appointment(int, String, String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, int) - Constructor for class myatt.model.Appointment
Constructor where only fields associated with customers are needed for the reports.
Appointment(int, String, String, String, Contacts, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, int, int) - Constructor for class myatt.model.Appointment
Constructs an appointment with all the fields specified.
Appointment(String, String, String, Contacts, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, int, int) - Constructor for class myatt.model.Appointment
Constructor without an appointmentID for when its auto generated.
